_instructions: Choose the section matching your surface and copy it to the appropriate file.

claude_code._how_to: Run from the wikicitation-mcp/ folder: claude mcp add wikilite -- uv run python server.py

claude_desktop._how_to: Copy the 'mcpServers' block into the file above and restart Claude Desktop.

_how_to: 1. Start HTTP server: uv run fastmcp run server.py --transport streamable-http --port 8000
2. Open claude.ai -> Settings -> Connections -> Add MCP server
Note: for remote access, expose the server via a tunnel (ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, etc.)

r_home_by_os._tip: Find your R_HOME by running: Rscript -e 'R.home()'
